title: Paramyrciaria glazioviana
taxonomy: Paramyrciaria glazioviana is classified as a species within the family Myrciaceae, a family of flowering plants in the order Myrtales. It belongs to the genus Paramyrciaria, which is a group of plants native to the tropical regions of South America. The classification of Paramyrciaria glazioviana is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. This plant is closely related to other species within the family Myrciaceae, which includes a wide range of plants such as myrtle and guava. By understanding its classification, researchers can gain insights into the evolutionary history and relationships of Paramyrciaria glazioviana with other plant species.
